title: Boatcars
description: Dreamed of having a drift car in Minecraft? Dreams come true!
body:
## Boatcars / Driftboats (1.13-1.19+)
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QFVkGDvU/images/39f289f25b66529484c13d21c8f197709a679640.png)
![Modrinth_Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/QFVkGDvU?style=for-the-badge)
![Modrinth_Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/QFVkGDvU?style=for-the-badge)
![Modrinth_Followers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/QFVkGDvU?style=for-the-badge)

### Dreamed of having a drift car in minecraft? Dreams come true! - Meet the drift boat!
I made this in 5 minutes, thanks if you downloading it.

***Inspired by [@ManDayat`s](https://tiktok.com/@mandayat) TikTok with drift boat***

[![Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/QFVkGDvU)
